author: Geo
description: Focus the first empty checkbox when opening daily notes. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Geo
manifest.description: Focus or create the configured empty checkbox when opening daily notes.
manifest.name: Daily Checkbox Focus

name: Daily Checkbox Focus

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
### Fixed

- Normalized saved plugin settings from `unknown` values before assigning them to typed settings, resolving the Obsidian community review warning for unsafe assignment.

### Changed

- Release workflow now generates release notes from `CHANGELOG.md`.
- Release workflow now generates GitHub artifact attestations for release assets.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.1.1

### Fixed

- Created top capture checkboxes now include a trailing space after the checkbox marker, so typing starts after `- [ ] ` instead of immediately after `]`.
- Focusing an existing empty top checkbox now normalizes missing spacing before placing the cursor.
- The fix applies to both automatic focus on daily-note open and the manual jump command.

### Notes

- The plugin still only operates in the top capture area before the first heading.
- It does not touch checkboxes inside later sections, Tasks query blocks, callouts, or blockquotes.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.1.0

### Added

- The plugin can now maintain a top capture checkbox by inserting one before the first heading when none exists.
- Added settings for automatic focus on open and creating a missing top checkbox.

### Fixed

- Focus is now limited to the top capture area before the first heading.
- The cursor no longer jumps into later sections such as Work, Life, Hobbies, or Todo.Family.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Initial public release of Daily Checkbox Focus.

Features:
- Automatically focuses the first empty checkbox in daily notes named YYYY-MM-DD.md.
- Runs only once per file-open session.
- Cancels pending auto-focus attempts after user edits.
- Skips fenced code blocks, Tasks query blocks, callouts, and blockquotes.
- Includes manual jump and debug commands.
